Wear it all day long and rest assured you’ll still look polished enough for your dinner reservation.

products.title: The Elba
products.description: A minimalist, monochromatic slide crafted from the softest calf leather with a calf hair band, The Elba offers a dressier take on a traditionally casual silhouette. It’s set on our cushiest footbed ever for all-day comfort, but this easy-chic pair looks as good as it feels. Wear it on days when you’re out and about with no time to change before that dinner reservation.

It’s a minimalist silhouette that evokes the ease of an Italian summer, designed to flatter the foot, mold to your perfect fit, and wear with just about anything. Our artisan, Paolo, is an expert at the traditional technique

products.title: The Mafalda Alta (Sample Sale)
products.description: I had summer weddings and events in mind when I had the idea to add a walkable block heel to our quintessential Italian leather sandal. Inspired by the styles that have become synonymous with the southern Italian coast, The Mafalda Alta features our signature interlocking vamp in an array of versatile colors. Wear it with denim and dresses alike.

products.title: The Sacca Donna (Sample Sale)
products.description: The Sacca Donna is our classic Italian-style loafer, sewn by hand in luxuriously soft suede. Unlined for utmost flexibility, lightness, and comfort, it also features rubber inserts on the sole and a stacked leather heel for added traction. It’s the ideal year-round shoe.

products.title: The Valeria 80mm (Sample Sale)
products.description: Our signature stiletto, The Valeria, shines even brighter in silver specchio. Everything from the angle of the toe to the precise placement of the stiletto has been thoughtfully considered for comfort and beauty. To achieve the streamlined silhouette, Pasquale and Giovanni—-our heel experts—rely on their family’s generations-old technique of hand cutting a single piece of material to form the seam

products.title: The Solange Tote
products.description: Italian leather trim and straps add an extra dose of polish to this vacation-ready raffia tote. The Solange’s slim profile expands to make room for a towel, your beach read, sunscreen, and more. Plus, we made sure it was just the right size to slide under an airplane seat. Buon viaggio!

products.title: The Attilia
products.description: Reinterpreted for the season in natural raffia, this version of The Attilia features the same clever convertible handle and crossbody strap that let you carry it four different ways as the original. It’s air-light and packs flat for travel. And you’ll be amazed how much you can fit into the compact silhouette: phone, wallet, keys, eyeglass case, and lipstick with room to spare!

products.title: The Michela
products.description: An on-trend take on a bestseller, this iteration of The Michela is punctuated with chic dome studs and metal eyelets. A minimalist thong silhouette with a wide band, it’s handcrafted from soft Italian calf leather and has no visible seams. It’s my favorite kind of shoe: goes with everything and takes up almost no room in a suitcase.

products.title: The Ursula Baguette
products.description: Rendered in luxuriously soft suede, The Ursula Baguette features tubular leather handles that wrap around the exterior for tonal dimension and structure. The elongated silhouette is sophisticated and modern—with plenty of room for your everyday essentials. And the straps are the perfect length for tossing effortlessly over your shoulder.

products.title: The Marta
products.description: The Marta combines borrowed-from-the-90s minimalism with our modern approach to comfort. The thong strap is hand cut from a single piece of leather—the same soft nappa as The Una—and elegantly hugs the lines of the foot. It’s set on a slim block heel that looks like a sleek stiletto in profile but offers more stability when walking.

products.title: The Lizza Due
products.description: By popular demand, we’ve brought back our best-selling platform sandal—now with a slimmer, more refined heel. Chic, comfortable, and easy to dress up or down, The Lizza Due is a must-have for party season. With its walkable 70mm block heel and platform, it can handle cobblestones, subway grates, dance floors—you name it.

products.title: The Pastoso Signature Mule
products.description: The Pastoso Signature Mule is everything you love about our MG-horsebit driver in an easy slip-on silhouette. It’s an ideal transitional shoe for days that start with cool mornings and end with humid evenings. As with all of our driving loafers, every single element—including the rubber gommini sole—is hand stitched by our artisan Norina and her team.

products.title: The Lucia
products.description: I knew we’d gotten this one right when team M.Gemi audibly gasped the first time they felt The Lucia’s buttery soft band—that has a thin layer of foam inside for even more comfort. Crafted from the finest Italian python-print nappa leather, this minimalist silhouette with a walkable block heel will look equally at home at the office or on the dance floor.

products.title: The Dora
products.description: As someone who lives in heels but sometimes needs something more practical, I love the versatility of a clog. The Dora gives me the extra height I want on an endlessly walkable (and shockingly lightweight) wood platform. The peep-toe silhouette is perfect for the sunny season—with a soft suede band and a cushioned insole that ensure this is a shoe you can wear all day, every day.

products.title: The Firenze
products.description: The Firenze is everything you love about a penny loafer with none of the break in time. That’s because our artisans use a method called Blake construction in which the supple suede upper, insole, and outsole are attached with one chain stitch that goes through each layer. It’s popular in Italy for its sleeker profile and greater flexibility, which gives the shoes an already-broken-in feeling.

products.title: The Vela
products.description: A boat shoe meets a driving loafer. The Vela is handcrafted using true moccasin construction, which means one piece of suede is cut to form the sides and sole of the shoe to ensure utmost softness and flexibility. products.title: The Lorella
products.description: The Lorella boasts all the comfort of a molded footbed with a slimmer profile. Crafted from soft Italian calf leather and set on a lightweight rubber sole, it features slender straps punctuated by a handpainted buckle that showcases our artisan’s attention to detail and helps you find a perfect fit. At once effortless and elegant, these pair with anything and everything.

products.title: Justin Test
products.description: A fresh take on a retro-inspired sneaker. Highlighted by vintage varsity color blocking, it’s updated with a unique technological footbed providing maximum comfort and ease—an unbeatable grand slam.

products.title: The Luce
products.description: The iconically Italian and effortlessly chic sandal construction you love, now on a walkable 25mm stacked heel. To make The Luce, our artisan uses a traditional method of weaving the leather straps through slots cut into the footbed. It gives the wearer a made-for-you fit that only gets better with wear.

products.title: The Rosalba
products.description: You’ll find artisan-handwoven leather throughout our collection, but it’s at its most dressed-up on The Rosalba. The minimalist mule features a softly squared toe and is set on a sculptural kitten heel—a gorgeous design choice that also gives you extra stability and an easier time walking over cobblestones or subway grates. Style it with jeans and dresses alike.

products.title: The Domitilla
products.description: Meet your ultimate dress shoe. The Domitilla’s strappy silhouette is all about clean lines that elongate the leg. The soft Italian leather straps are thoughtfully placed to flatter the foot and keep you feeling secure, while discreet elastics ensure they’ll adjust with you as you walk (i.e. no rubbing). This is one of my favorite heels we’ve ever made, and I’m thrilled it’s back in the collection.

products.title: The Cosima
products.description: With its 70s-inspired silhouette and fisherman-style straps, The Cosima combines two comeback trends into one of-the-moment clog. The wooden platform is ultra lightweight and features both a cushioned suede footbed for guaranteed comfort and a rubber sole for a quieter step (no clip-clop sound here!). I’m picturing it with wide-leg jeans or a breezy dress for a modern take on boho-chic.

products.title: The Mara
products.description: The Mara is a classic d’Orsay slingback with a literal twist. Its sculptural twisted heel is finished with tonal lacquer for a high-gloss statement, and a slight flare at the end ensures extra stability for the already-walkable 70mm height. It’s handcrafted by our heel experts, Pasquale and Giovanni, whom we rely on for their dedication to comfort.

products.title: The Como
products.description: The Como’s artisan hand-braided suede straps are thoughtfully placed for a flattering silhouette and secure fit. Made by the same artisan, using the same traditional slotted footbed technique, who makes customer favorites The Medio Woven Due and The Mafalda, it’s designed to mold to your foot with each wear. Dress it up or dress it down, but definitely pack it for your next sun-drenched vacation.

products.title: The Mafalda Alta
products.description: I had summer weddings and events in mind when I had the idea to add a walkable block heel to our quintessential Italian leather sandal. Inspired by the styles that have become synonymous with the southern Italian coast, The Mafalda Alta features our signature interlocking vamp in an array of versatile colors. Wear it with denim and dresses alike.

products.title: The Medio Woven Due
products.description: The Medio Woven Due is handcrafted on the Italian coast, just like the custom leather sandals I used to buy on vacation as a young girl. Featuring an artisan hand-braided strap, it evokes the ease of an Italian summer and is designed to flatter the foot, mold to your perfect fit, and wear with just about anything. products.title: The Selene
products.description: Defined by its intrecciato nubuck band, The Selene is an easy-yet-elevated slide. Its cushy molded footbed ensures walk-all-day comfort, while its lightweight flatform sole gives you a little lift. I keep this pair by the door for when I need to dash out, and it’s on my packing list for summer vacations.

products.description: The Attilia is a soft, drapey suede shoulder bag with a clever convertible handle and crossbody strap that let you carry it four different ways. It’s air-light and packs flat for travel. And you’ll be amazed how much you can fit into the compact silhouette: phone, wallet, keys, eyeglass case, and lipstick with room to spare!

products.title: The Rigoletta
products.description: A relaxed, mid-size shoulder bag, The Rigoletta is the perfect everyday companion. It’s crafted from the most supple leathers and lined with cotton canvas. Inside, you’ll find two pockets to keep you organized and a pair of adjustable straps. Attach these interior straps for a more compact shape or leave them undone for a roomier silhouette.

products.title: The Felize Shearling
products.description: Every year, as cold weather approaches, we add a genuine shearling lining to our beloved driving moccasin. Like the original, The Felize Shearling is made using true moccasin construction, which means one piece of suede is cut to form the sides and sole of the shoe, ensuring the softness and flexibility the style is known for. It’s the ultimate cozy-season style.

products.title: The Orlanda

products.title: The Felize Uomo
products.description: Our first-ever and best-selling shoe—for good reason. The Felize Uomo is made using true moccasin construction, which means one piece of suede is cut to form the sides and sole of the shoe, ensuring the softness and flexibility the style is known for. Every single element of these classic driving moccasins—including the rubber gommini sole—is hand stitched by our artisan Norina and her team.

products.title: The Cosima
products.description: With its 70s-inspired silhouette and fisherman-style straps, The Cosima combines two comeback trends into one of-the-moment clog. The wooden platform is ultra lightweight and features both a cushioned suede footbed for guaranteed comfort and a rubber sole for a quieter step (no clip-clop sound here!). I’m picturing it with wide-leg jeans or a breezy dress for a modern take on boho-chic.

products.title: The Danza Woven
products.description: On the outside: Intrecciato (woven) leather gives The Danza an all-new look. On the inside: A 20mm hidden wedge and sacchetto construction—a technique in which the soft leather lining is sewn with minimal seams for a glove-like fit—make for an astonishingly comfortable shoe.

products.title: The Enrica
products.description: I love wearing heels, but when I’m in Italy, the cobblestone streets can be a challenge. Handcrafted in metallic nappa leather by our heel experts in Campania, The Enrica is a chic solution. To accentuate the leg-lengthening profile, a slim strap hugs the squared-off wedge heel and wraps across the arch of the foot—finishing with a decorative buckle designed in the shape of a bow.

products.title: The Ombretta Lattice
products.description: Heel-baring slingbacks have long been one of my favorite ways to show a little skin, but The Ombretta takes it to another level. The soft, lattice-cut leather is a fresh take on the transparency trend and an effortlessly chic alternative to sandals during the warmer months. Meanwhile, the leather-wrapped elastic is designed to give you a secure fit—while also being gentle on your heel.

products.title: The Sacca Donna Mule
products.description: The Sacca Donna Mule is one of our most requested silhouettes, a favorite from season’s past and the sister style to our signature loafer. Sewn by hand in luxuriously soft metallic nappa leather, using generations-old traditional techniques, the easy slip-on silhouette is ideal for warmer months. It’s so comfortable, you may even forget you’re wearing it.

The Felize is made using true moccasin construction, which means one piece of suede is cut to form the sides and sole of the shoe, ensuring the softness and flexibility the style is known for. Every single element of these classic driving moccasins—including the rubber gommini sole—is hand stitched by our artisan Norina and her team.

products.title: The Amabile
products.description: The Mary Jane made mesh. Rendered in breathable, double-layer mesh with tonal leather accents, The Amabile is a playful take on a classic handcrafted by the artisans behind some of our best-selling flats. Wear it from the first warm days of spring through the summer heat and well into fall.

products.title: The Attilia
products.description: The Attilia is a soft, drapey suede shoulder bag with a clever convertible handle and crossbody strap that let you carry it four different ways. It’s air-light and packs flat for travel. And you’ll be amazed how much you can fit into the compact silhouette: phone, wallet, keys, eyeglass case, and lipstick with room to spare!

products.title: The Rosanna
products.description: The Rosanna’s asymmetric slingback strap and flattering V-cut topline make for a sharp, architectural shape, but the python-embossed leather is heavenly soft. I love the idea of its pointed toe peeking out from beneath the season’s sweeping, wide-leg pants—though this is the kind of effortlessly chic pair you can wear with just about everything.

products.title: The Esatto 90mm (Sample Sale)
products.description: We worked with heels experts Pasquale and Giovanni to make our signature leg-lengthening stiletto. It’s a rarely done, hands-on process our artisans’ family has perfected over generations.

products.title: The Felize Suede (Sample Sale)
products.description: Our first-ever and best-selling shoe—for good reason. The Felize is made using true moccasin construction, which means one piece of suede is cut to form the sides and sole of the shoe, ensuring the softness and flexibility the style is known for. Every single element of these classic driving moccasins—including the rubber gommini sole—is hand stitched by our artisan Norina and her team.

products.title: The Felize Suede (Sample Sale)
products.description: Our first-ever and best-selling shoe—for good reason. The Felize is made using true moccasin construction, which means one piece of suede is cut to form the sides and sole of the shoe, ensuring the softness and flexibility the style is known for. Every single element of these classic driving moccasins—including the rubber gommini sole—is hand stitched by our artisan Norina and her team.

products.title: The Gia (Sample Sale)
products.description: The Gia’s streamlined silhouette comes from its unique Sacchetto construction, which uses a single piece of leather stitched away from the foot for a buttery-soft, glove-like fit. It looks and feels like a flat, but a hidden wedge gives you much-needed arch support.

Crafted from smooth nappa leather, The Cassandra is slingback-esque—with a tubular ankle strap that offers a distinctive contrast to its clean, angular silhouette. Wear it from the office to aperitivo hour.

products.title: The Palestra Facile
products.description: The Palestra Facile was designed for utmost ease (“facile” means “easy” in Italian). products.title: The Palestra Due
products.description: We spent over a year perfecting our signature sneaker, using a combination of customer feedback and artisan expertise to strike a balance of all-day comfort and streamlined style. Crafted from ultra-soft and flexible metallic leather, this Palestra Due features the same lightweight rubber sole and breathable footbed as its more minimalist sibling. It's a bonafide closet staple.

products.title: The Zoe
products.description: With an adjustable zig-zag strap and squared-off toe, The Zoe combines the best of a ballet flat and a Mary Jane. We made it from soft metallic leather, so it feels great even as it maintains a clean, structured shape.

products.title: The Rita Basso
products.description: A Western bootie made the Italian way, The Rita Basso is handcrafted from luxuriously soft suede with a hint of slouch. From the smooth leather piping and tonal stitching to the hand-painted welt, every inch is thoughtfully considered for both style and utility. The mid-calf shaft and mid-height heel mean it pairs well with of-the-moment midi dresses and wide-legged jeans.

products.description: The bag of the season is here. The Francesca is a convertible clutch that's simple, elegant, and undeniably fun. Loop the tubular strap around your wrist and keep your hands free (for a glass of Prosecco, perhaps?).

products.title: The Laura Convertible Backpack
products.description: Two versatile bags in one, The Laura exemplifies how true Italian craftsmanship never ignores functionality. The relaxed, roomy shape—featuring two interior pockets—fits your laptop, wallet, cosmetic bag, water bottle, and more little essentials. Simply slide the straps to transform it from shoulder bag to backpack and back again. It’s my go-to travel bag.

products.title: The Barca
products.description: The Barca is our take on the all-American boat shoe—with an Italian accent. It’s handcrafted using true moccasin construction, which means one piece of tumbled leather is cut to form the sides and sole of the shoe to ensure softness and flexibility. And, it’s finished with a full rubber gommini sole—a signature of Italian driving moccasins—in contrasting colors.

products.title: The Laura Convertible Backpack
products.description: Two versatile bags in one, The Laura exemplifies how true Italian craftsmanship never ignores functionality. The relaxed, roomy shape—featuring two interior pockets—fits your laptop, wallet, cosmetic bag, water bottle, and more little essentials. Simply slide the straps to transform it from shoulder bag to backpack and back again. It’s my go-to travel bag.

products.title: The Danza
products.description: As I was dreaming up this square-toe ballet flat, I realized it didn’t actually have to be flat. With its 20mm hidden wedge, The Danza has the classic look you love and much-needed arch support. That combined with its unique sacchetto construction— a technique in which the soft leather lining is sewn with minimal seams for a glove-like fit—makes for an astonishingly comfortable shoe.

products.title: The Bruno
products.description: An ultra-soft kid suede upper and durable rubber sole come together for the ultimate hand-stitched loafer. With a sole that contrasts in color, the style pairs equally well with a pair of jeans as it does a suit—all year long.

products.title: The Danza
products.description: As I was dreaming up this square-toe ballet flat, I realized it didn’t actually have to be flat. With its 20mm hidden wedge, The Danza has the classic look you love and much-needed arch support. That combined with its unique sacchetto construction— a technique in which the soft leather lining is sewn with minimal seams for a glove-like fit—makes for an astonishingly comfortable shoe.

The Felize is made using true moccasin construction, which means one piece of suede is cut to form the sides and sole of the shoe, ensuring the softness and flexibility the style is known for. Every single element of these classic driving moccasins—including the rubber gommini sole—is hand stitched by our artisan Norina and her team.

products.title: The Esatto 90mm
products.description: We worked with heels experts Pasquale and Giovanni to make our signature leg-lengthening stiletto. The Esatto’s sleek silhouette is achieved by hand cutting a single piece of Italian leather to form the seamless, elegantly curved upper—a hallmark of luxury craftsmanship. It’s a rarely done, hands-on process our artisans’ family has perfected over generations.
